## Linked Issue

<!-- REQUIRED: Every PR must close an approved issue. Replace N with the issue number. -->
Closes #N

---

## PR Type

<!-- Check exactly ONE. Add the matching label to this PR. -->

- [ ] Bug fix → add label `type:bug`
- [ ] New feature → add label `type:feature`
- [ ] Code refactoring → add label `type:refactor`
- [ ] Documentation only → add label `type:docs`
- [ ] Maintenance / tooling → add label `type:chore`
- [ ] Breaking change → add label `type:breaking-change`

## Test Plan

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] No regressions in existing behavior
- [ ] Manually tested the affected functionality

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] Linked an approved issue (`status:approved`)
- [ ] Added exactly one `type:*` label
- [ ] Conventional commit format used
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailers in commits
- [ ] Docs / CLAUDE.md updated if behavior changed
